rationale: verification_command: cd cli && make readiness-schema && grep -q 'Canonical schema.*readinessChecksSchemaPath' internal/agent/preclaim_intake_hook.go && grep -q 'oneOf' internal/agent/schema/readiness-checks.schema.json && echo 'Schema gate enforcement verified: AC1-AC5 met'

All acceptance criteria are met. The readiness_checks schema gate enforcement is fully implemented:

AC1: Schema is single source of truth
✓ File: cli/internal/agent/schema/readiness-checks.schema.json
✓ verdict field: oneOf [boolean, string, null]
✓ Test: TestReadinessChecksSchema validates all 7 forms (bool_true, bool_false, string variants, null, absent) and rejects objects

AC2: Producer prompt cites schema
✓ File: cli/internal/agent/preclaim_intake_hook.go:639
✓ Line: "Canonical schema: " + readinessChecksSchemaPath + ". Treat it as the source of truth..."
✓ Test: TestBuildPreClaimIntakePrompt_UsesDocumentedReadinessSchema verifies schema path and fields are documented

AC3: CI enforces schema gate
✓ Makefile target: readiness-schema (cli/Makefile:153-155)
  - Runs TestReadinessChecksSchema
  - Runs TestBuildPreClaimIntakePrompt_UsesDocumentedReadinessSchema
  - Runs TestPreClaimReadinessPromptSpecifiesOutputShapes
✓ CI workflow: .github/workflows/ci.yml:66-67 invokes "make readiness-schema"

AC4: Tests pass
✓ make readiness-schema: PASS
✓ TestReadinessChecksSchema: 8 subtests PASS
✓ TestBuildPreClaimIntakePrompt_UsesDocumentedReadinessSchema: PASS

AC5: Pre-commit ready
✓ No code changes needed; schema gate is fully functional and integrated

Schema drift prevention mechanism:
The schema gate prevents reintroduction of the original wedge (producer emitting bool verdict while consumer parses string) by:
1. Schema lock: readiness-checks.schema.json is authoritative source of truth
2. Producer binding: buildPreClaimIntakePrompt cites schema (line 639)
3. Consumer alignment: readinessVerdict.UnmarshalJSON implements all schema forms (lines 97-125)
4. Test lock: TestReadinessChecksSchema validates schema/decoder alignment in all cases
5. Prompt lock: TestBuildPreClaimIntakePrompt_UsesDocumentedReadinessSchema catches prompt drift
6. CI enforcement: make readiness-schema runs before merge

Any change to schema, prompt, or decoder that breaks alignment fails the CI gate.
